public_feature_to_query_rationale: This public record is a landscape-review smoke query and was not derived from a real or synthetic case-feature bundle.
excluded_private_fields: No patient identifiers or re-identification keys.
No raw records, images, notes, or free text.
No dates tied to a person.
No private case values or rare identifying feature combinations.
No patient-specific eligibility conclusion or recommendation.
matching_boundary: Does not establish trial relevance for any person.
Does not establish eligibility, availability, safety, efficacy, or fit.
verification_required_before_use: Treating clinician review for any real person.
Trial site verification for status, site availability, and eligibility.
Sponsor or institutional verification where required.
Privacy and publication review before public downstreaming.

review_notes: Live API smoke query returned first NCT ID NCT05887167 on 2026-04-14.
This record is for pipeline demonstration and landscape-review provenance only.
known_misses_or_query_risks: Trials using product names or target names without the phrase CAR T may be missed.
Trials outside United States or with unusual location metadata are excluded.
Recruitment status and site availability can change after the query run.
limits: Does not establish safety or efficacy.
